creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
There are two new Slim themes that can be packed.  David E. Thiel
<lx@redundancy.redundancy.org> should be credited for notifying
me about them.

Fix: The following patch will add these new themes.  It was tested on my
Tinderbox and daily operations.
How-To-Repeat: 
Look at http://slim.berlios.de/themes01.php, you will see FreeBSD
and gNewSense themes.
